description: Create a hierarchical Operation Span (OSpan) experiment in PsychoPy Builder where participants solve math problems while remembering letters. The experiment requires a nested loop design: an outer loop for blocks (set sizes) and an inner loop for the trials within a block. Set up the project in `/home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/ospan/` with a `conditions/` subdirectory. Create `set_size_3.csv` (3 rows), `set_size_4.csv` (4 rows), and `block_list.csv` (2 rows) with columns for `equation`, `correctKey`, `letter`, and `conditionFile`. Build the experiment file at `/home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/ospan/ospan.psyexp` using routines named `math_problem` (displaying `$equation`), `letter_store` (displaying `$letter`), and `recall`. The flow must feature an outer loop named `blocks` using `block_list.csv` and an inner loop named `trials` using the `$conditionFile` variable. Ensure `math_problem` and `letter_store` are nested within the inner loop, while `recall` occurs after the inner loop but within the outer loop. The final experiment should run a block of 3 items followed by recall, then a block of 4 items followed by recall.
